title: minuartia mutabilis subsp. tenuissima
intro: Minuartia mutabilis subsp. tenuissima, also known as narrow-leaved rock-cress, is a plant species belonging to the carnation family and native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Minuartia mutabilis subsp. tenuissima include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
